prompt:
Scene:
A dark walnut oracle table in a quiet library at night, lit by one warm candle on the left and a soft cool moonbeam from a high window on the right. Fine dust motes in the air, black velvet cloth beneath the object, shallow background blur.

Subject:
One large transparent crystal ball centered in frame, resting on an antique brass three-claw stand with small engraved moon phases. The ball fills about 68% of the square image width. Inside the ball is a complete miniature spring world: a winding river, white blossom trees, a tiny bridge, two tiny travelers, and distant misty mountains, all visibly distorted by glass refraction.

Important details:
Photorealistic studio still life, macro product-photography realism, 85mm lens, high dynamic range glass caustics, accurate refraction, subtle double reflections on the sphere, crisp brass patina, dark wood grain, warm amber and cool blue lighting. The miniature world must appear physically inside the glass, not painted on the surface.

Use case:
First image in a three-image series for a public gallery, demonstrating object continuity and narrative compression inside a crystal ball. Square crop-safe composition, strong thumbnail readability.

Constraints:
No readable text, no watermark, no logos, no human hands, no extra crystal balls, no fantasy glow outside the sphere, no cartoon style, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio.
title: Spring Oracle
description: A spring miniature world appears inside a crystal ball on an antique oracle table.

generation.runner_notes: No reference image required. Queue can run this image directly from prompt.

en.title: Spring Oracle
en.description: A spring miniature world appears inside a crystal ball on an antique oracle table.

zh-CN.title: 春日预言球
zh-CN.description: 一座春日微缩世界出现在古董占卜桌上的水晶球内部。

alt.en: A photorealistic crystal ball containing a tiny spring landscape on a dark oracle table.
alt.zh-CN: 一颗写实水晶球位于深色占卜桌上，球内有春日微缩景观。
